ksa_text: Knowledge of AI security threats and adversarial ML techniques, including data poisoning, model extraction, evasion attacks, prompt injection, and the defensive measures and robustness testing approaches applicable to each.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of Extensible Markup Language (XML) schemas

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of Extensible Markup Language (XML) schemas

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-028 (AI, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.3966 is insufficient to establish relevance to health informatics, clinical data analysis, and healthcare BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (onet=0.397, nice=0.388, dcwf=0.383) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3966 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-K-028 (composite 0.3966) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3966 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Health Informatics Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.3966 is not a standard requirement for Health Informatics Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3966, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
